name: /doctor reports the freshness state of every pr-corpus-backed rule in the active profile
command:
mkdir -p profiles .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch && printf '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && printf 'rules:
  - {id: r1, provenance: [{class: pr-corpus, source_id: cfpb}]}
' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --profile profiles/p.yaml --check pr-corpus-freshness --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z 2>out.txt && grep -q 'r1: cfpb=fresh' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
